description: Several pages of late accounts in Hebrew script. The first page is in Latin-script Italian and mentions the words "imposto" and "via Livorno" as well as the names: "Katrina," "Gambillo," and " il Sig[nore] Ieuda."
description_he: מספר עמודים של חשבונות מאוחרים בכתב עברי. הדף הראשון בכתב לטיני איטלקי ומזכיר: 'imposto', 'via Livorno', 'Katrina', 'Gambillo', 'il Sig[nore] Ieuda'.
